hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) /Users/ryujunyeol/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.1/bin/pnpm exec prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; }
